events.headline: IRAN WAR: WHAT IS HAPPENING ON DAY 13 OF US-ISRAEL ATTACKS?
events.detail: Cyberattacks, tensions in the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices are deepening the global consequences of the war.

events.headline: OIL PRICE JUMPS DESPITE DEAL TO RELEASE RECORD AMOUNT OF RESERVES
events.detail: It comes as Iranian attacks on ships intensify in the crucial Strait of Hormuz waterway.

events.headline: FBI WARNS OF ‘IRANIAN DRONE THREAT’ TO CALIFORNIA
events.detail: The FBI has warned of potential Iranian plans to launch drone raids on California using a vessel off the West Coast Read Full Article at RT.com

events.headline: IRAN TARGETS GULF NATIONS WITH MISSILES, DRONES AS OIL PRICES SOAR
events.detail: Bahrain reports an attack on fuel tanks as Saudi Arabia shoots down drones headed towards an oilfield.

events.headline: SIX VESSELS ATTACKED AMID REPORTS OF IRANIAN DRONE BOATS, SEA MINES
events.detail: Iraq reportedly suspends oil terminal operations after two tankers hit by explosive-laden boats in Iraqi waters.

events.headline: UN SECURITY COUNCIL ADOPTS RESOLUTION CONDEMNING IRAN’S ATTACKS IN THE GULF
events.detail: UN Security Council draft resolution demanding Iran end its attacks on Gulf nations was cosponsored by 135 countries.
